title: neurada procumbens
intro: Neurada procumbens, also known as running buffalo-berry or wild buffalo-berry, is a perennial plant native to eastern North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Neurada procumbens include its ability to treat a range of ailments, such as digestive issues, fever, and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Neurada procumbens can be made into teas, infusions, or salves, and are often used to soothe and calm irritated skin.
